task_completion.description: Organize sound effect bookmarks into specific folders
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Chrome Bookmarks Bar or Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks/) showing folders created specifically for sound effects, with relevant bookmark links placed inside them.

task_completion.description: Disable Hardware Acceleration and Background Apps
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of Chrome System settings (chrome://settings/system) showing the toggles for 'Continue running background apps when Google Chrome is closed' and 'Use hardware acceleration when available' both set to the OFF (grey) position.

task_completion.description: Enforce a global audio mute policy with whitelist exceptions for SFX libraries
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of Chrome Sound settings (chrome://settings/content/sound) showing the default behavior set to 'Don't allow sites to play sound' (Mute), with specific sound effect library domains listed under the 'Allowed to play sound' exceptions list.
Screenshot of Chrome Notifications settings (chrome://settings/content/notifications) showing the default behavior set to 'Don't allow sites to send notifications'.

task_completion.description: Configure rapid downloads to the SFX_Downloads folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of Chrome Downloads settings (chrome://settings/downloads) showing the 'Location' path ending in 'SFX_Downloads' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' set to the OFF (grey) position.

task_completion.description: Delete cookies for freesound.org and splice.com without removing other session data
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of Chrome's 'All site data and permissions' page (chrome://settings/content/all) showing a search or list where freesound.org and splice.com are absent/deleted, while other domains (control cookies) are still present in the list.

integrity.description: Agent used the Chrome graphical user interface to make configuration changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through Chrome settings menus rather than using a terminal to edit the Chrome 'Preferences' JSON file directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Chrome browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must display standard Chrome UI elements such as the tab bar, omnibox (address bar), and the left-hand settings navigation menu.

integrity.description: Agent navigated to legitimate Chrome internal settings pages
integrity.visual_evidence: The omnibox (address bar) in the screenshots should display valid internal URLs like 'chrome://settings/system', 'chrome://settings/content/sound', etc., rather than local file paths or external mock websites.
